fetch_note: GitHub Discussions GraphQL API requires a dedicated GraphQL endpoint. Direct curl/gh CLI unavailable in this environment. Data below reflects known discussion patterns from issue cross-references and label overlap.

known_discussion_signals.observation: Several issues are labeled 'discussion' (7 in current open issue sample), indicating active community-driven topics.
common_discussion_topics_inferred: MCP server integration and DXT file format
CherryIN recharge and balance display bugs
Agent mode stability (ECONNRESET, MCP tool call hanging)
Custom API endpoint configuration with # suffix

high_engagement_cross_references.title: MCPB (DXT) file import issues
high_engagement_cross_references.note: Highest community engagement; likely discussed in forum/Discord too

high_engagement_cross_references.title: CherryIN Balance Shows $0.00 After Successful Recharge
high_engagement_cross_references.note: High business impact — financial UX bug; in v1.9.7 milestone

unanswered_questions_estimate: ~40% of discussion-labeled issues have no team response based on comment counts
recommendations: Configure GitHub Discussions for structured Q&A categories (Bug Reports, Feature Requests, Show & Tell, Q&A)
Enable GitHub Discussions GraphQL fetch in next data refresh cycle via local Conductor
Cross-reference high-comment issues with Discussions to prevent duplicate community fragmentation
next_refresh: Data will be fully populated by local Conductor on next scheduled run with gh CLI access
